name: openlca-mcp
summary: Use the openlca-mcp MCP server to expose openLCA IPC tools to AI assistants via the Model Context Protocol, enabling natural-language LCA workflows in Claude, Cursor, VS Code Copilot, and similar clients.
toolchain: Claude Desktop / Cursor / VS Code Copilot
when_to_use: Preferred when the study is being driven interactively through an AI assistant client that supports MCP tool calls.
